creator: mldodson@comcast.net
text:
I'm writing this because of the mismatch of the maintainer email
address on file and my email.  I AM the current maintainer of this
port, although, as pointed out in the original send-pr, my email has
changed.  I have not received the notice that feedback is required, as
I expected would be so.  However, I certainly approve of the change
(since I submitted the send-pr to begin with).  Please change the
port as indicated in the patch I sent.
-- 
M. L. Dodson
Email:	mldodson-at-comcast-net
Phone:	eight_three_two-five_63-386_one
